title: Creamy Lemon Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious stir fry made with creamy sauce and a hint of lemon.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the tofu and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the creamy sauce and lemon juice.
Pour the sauce over the tofu and vegetables, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with garlic and serve hot.
